hypothesis: If Ar/O2 mixture etching rates are predicted using a GraphSAGE model that aggregates frozen features from pre-trained single-gas O2 and Ar networks (with gas-fraction attributes), then the model will more accurately and robustly generalize to unseen power/pressure regimes and low-Ar-fraction cases (xAr ≤ 0.2) than FNN/GCN/GAT baselines because transferable single-gas embeddings composed by composition-aware message passing capture mixture etch physics.
